creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189532
patch to update www/rubygem-scrapi to 2.0.0

Please see attached patch. Note that textproc/rubygem-tidy_ffi has been created so this should be OK, but does need testing and confirmation that the port is still useful given that it seems to no longer be maintained upstream. (If you use it, you may considering taking over maintenance upstream, the original developer is looking for a new maintainer.)
